reform_metadata.methodology: 5-step pipeline: (1) cross-category loss netting, (2) gross gain estimation from loss ratios, (3) holding period filter, (4) bracket-based marginal rate, (5) revenue = reform tax on gross gains - current law tax on net gains. Under reform, gross gains become ordinary income; corresponding losses are stranded (only $3K/yr deductible against ordinary income per IRC 1211(b)).
reform_metadata.note: Holding period fractions and gross loss ratios are calibration placeholders based on IRS SOI Capital Assets Study and JCT estimates. This is a static estimate; actual revenue depends on behavioral responses.
